tasks.label: configure cmake
tasks.detail: Configure only: creates build/ and generates build.ninja. Re-run when CMakeLists.txt changes. Compiler (ARM GCC 14.2) + SDK 2.2.0 + picotool are reused from the sibling magner150 project's ./toolchain (REF_TOOLCHAIN in CMakeLists).

tasks.label: build pico
tasks.detail: Configure (if needed) + build via Ninja -> build/clkgen.uf2. Tools: magner150 ./toolchain/14_2_Rel1 (gcc 14.2) + pico-sdk-2.2.0 + picotool. PICO_BOARD=pico (RP2040).

tasks.label: flash pico (USB cable, no button)
tasks.detail: picotool load -fx -u: resets a running board into BOOTSEL over USB, flashes, executes. Works only while the running USB-stdio firmware is alive.

tasks.label: flash pico (hold BOOTSEL button)
tasks.detail: Fallback when the USB reset (-u) fails. Hold BOOTSEL while plugging USB, then run. picotool load -fx (no -u).
